name: tutorial-steps-visual
description: Step-by-step visual walkthrough of all 23 tutorial steps (0-22) with per-step screenshots for visual regression testing. Exercises the tutorial overlay from start through congratulations, capturing each step's UI state, highlight targets, and progress indicator.

steps.description: Setup: create game with seed 42 (24x12x24 tutorial_pit)
Setup: start tutorial pit level with $20,000 starting cash
Step 0: Start tutorial overlay — time-speed guidance displayed with highlight on #bs-hud-top .bs-speed-btn
Step 0 complete: increase time speed → overlay advances to step 1 (hire-surveyor)
Step 1 complete: hire surveyor employee → overlay advances to step 2 (survey)
Assign geology skill to surveyor for seismic survey
Step 2 complete: run seismic survey → overlay advances to step 3 (hire-driller)
Step 3 complete: hire driller → overlay advances to step 4 (drill-plan)
Assign blasting skill to driller for drill plan

steps.command: drill_plan grid rows:3 cols:3 spacing:5 depth:8 start:15,15
steps.description: Step 4 complete: create drill plan → overlay advances to step 5 (charge)
Step 5 complete: set charges on all holes → overlay advances to step 6 (sequence)
Step 6 complete: auto-sequence delays → overlay advances to step 7 (blast)
Step 7 complete: execute blast → overlay advances to step 8 (scores). Screenshot captures blast crater + fragments
Step 8: view scores overlay → auto-advances after 2s to step 9 (event-fire-resolve). Screenshot captures scores display
Step 9: advance time to fire tutorial_synergy_consultant event. Overlay fires event, pending event dialog appears
Resolve tutorial_synergy_consultant (hire consultant: -$3k, +15 well-being). Clears pending event guard
Step 10 complete: hire manager (event guard now clear) → overlay advances to step 11 (contract-accept)
Assign management skill to manager
Step 11 complete: accept first contract → overlay advances to step 12 (hire-driver)
Step 12 complete: hire driver → overlay advances to step 13 (vehicle-buy-assign)
Assign driving.truck skill to driver
Step 13: buy debris_hauler vehicle → overlay auto-executes buy debris_hauler
Step 13 complete: assign driver (ID 4) to vehicle (ID 1) → overlay advances to step 14 (build-storage)
Step 14 complete: build freight warehouse → overlay advances to step 15 (contract-deliver)
Step 15 complete: deliver first contract → overlay advances to step 16 (finances)
Step 16: view finances overlay → auto-advances after 2s to step 17 (build-ramp). Screenshot captures balance + contract earnings
Step 17 complete: build ramp on navGrid → overlay advances to step 18 (needs)
Step 18: view employee needs → auto-advances after 2s to step 19 (set-policy)
Step 19 complete: set shift policy → overlay advances to step 20 (tick-advance)
Step 20 complete: advance 6 ticks (tickCount > prev + 5) → overlay advances to step 21 (victory)
Step 21 complete: force level completion (levelEnded=true) → overlay advances to step 22 (congratulations)
Step 22: congratulations displayed → overlay auto-dismisses after 4s. Final state: isPaused=false, bs_tutorial_done set
